description.sourceText: An accessory that allows the player to dash in mid-air when equipped.
An accessory that allows the player to perform double dashes in mid-air when equipped.
An accessory that allows the player to perform triple dashes in mid-air when equipped.
An accessory that slightly reduces incoming Water damage.
An accessory that slightly raises Attack.
An accessory that extends the invincibility period of rolls and sidesteps.

An accessory with incredible resistance to cold.
Greatly reduces incoming Ice damage.
An accessory that slightly raises Cold Resistance.
An accessory that slightly reduces incoming Dark damage.
An accessory that slightly raises Defense.
An accessory that greatly raises Defense and Health.
An accessory that slightly reduces incoming Dragon damage.
An accessory that slightly reduces incoming Ground damage.

A lightweight yet durable undergarment made from special fibers.
It nullifies damage from explosions.
An accessory that slightly reduces incoming Fire damage.
An accessory that greatly raises Heat and Cold Resistance. It also significantly increases Health.
An accessory that greatly raises Heat and Cold Resistance. It also significantly increases carrying capacity.

An accessory with incredible resistance to heat.
Greatly reduces incoming Fire damage.

An accessory that allows the player to jump in mid-air when equipped.
Also grants a mid-air dash.

Also grants a double mid-air dash.

An accessory that allows the player to perform double jumps in mid-air when equipped.
An accessory that increases the player's jump power when equipped.
An accessory that slightly reduces incoming Grass damage.
An accessory that slightly raises carrying capacity.

Eyewear for Pal Tamers.
The wearer's attacks will not reduce the target's Health below 1.
Reveals hidden Pal potentials.

Pacifist's ring.
The wearer's attacks will not reduce the target's Health below 1.
Accessory that slightly lowers Neutral damage.

It also significantly increases the Dragon damage of the Pal fighting alongside you.

A rarely seen magical fruit.
It is said that a Pal who eats it will open
its heart to humans.
Choose carefully which Pal you give it to.

its heart to humans.

Core from technology that was lost long ago.
Nearly impossible to find on the Palpagos Islands, it contains a wealth of forgotten knowledge.

An ancient manuscript written on Pal hide. It may be found by Pals during expeditions.
Required for advancing research.

A book that contains long-lost secrets of technology from a forgotten era.
Use it to obtain Ancient Technology Points.

An that mows down enemies with overwhelming force.
It excels at rapid-fire and is well suited to taking down powerful foes.

A small pouch for holding food.
Unlocks a food slot in your inventory.
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

A decently sized pouch for holding food.
Unlocks 2 food slots in your inventory.
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

A large pouch for holding food.
Unlocks 3 food slots in your inventory.
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

A extra-large pouch for holding food.
Unlocks 4 food slots in your inventory.
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

An enormous pouch for holding food.
Unlocks 5 food slots in your inventory.
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.
Carrying one is enough.

An axe for chopping wood.
It has achieved extraordinary sharpness thanks to Pal Metal.
It can slice through high-grade trees from the harshest regions without trouble.

An axe for cutting wood.
Made from stone, it's not very sharp.

An axe for cutting wood.
Made from metal, it chops through Hardwood with ease, making it useful for harvesting sturdy trees that grow deep within the continent.

An axe for cutting wood.
Made from high quality metal, its sharpness and durability has improved even further.
It can harvest Hardwood from sturdy trees that grow in unforgiving lands.

The smoky essence of bacon intertwines flawlessly
with the gentle texture of eggs, creating a sublime harmony of flavors.
Eating it will increase by +10% for a period of time.

Cooking enhances their nutritional value,
and surprisingly, they are quite filling.

Mild roast filled with the natural aromas of
herbs and berries embedded in the meat.
Gives a pleasant sense of warmth when eaten outdoors.

Boar grilled over a hearty flame.
Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside.
Perfect as an extravagant main dish for a big party.

Chicken skewer slow-grilled over a charcoal fire.
Light and refreshing on the tongue.

Thick, well-done steak.
Strong flavors give those who eat it an energy boost.

Carefully roasted venison with delicate flavor notes,
accented by the aromas of the deep forest.
Elegant taste for an elegant lifestyle.
Grilled meat full of vitality for flying high in the skies.

Boasts a rich and dignified flavor.
Memories of glaciers and deep forests come rushing back with every bite.

Charcoal-grilled to perfection, this steak offers a crispy exterior and melt-in-your-mouth juiciness.
Unique compounds seal in flavor and enhance shelf life.

When taken from a flame, Reindrix meat rapidly drops in temperature.
This allows it to retain freshness for long periods of time,
making it a perfect emergency ration.

Fresh fish grilled over a charcoal fire.
Plump and juicy.

Grilled fish slathered with a secret sauce.
Soothes both mind and body.
Perfect for tired Pal Tamers.

Grilled meat brimming with the flavor of the king of the wilds.
Juices from the compressed meat flow from the bone,
making it surprisingly tender despite the initial toughness.

Spiced and roasted mutton.
Deeply complex with unique flavors.

Cooking this mushroom enhances its nutritional value.
Curiously, it's also quite filling.

A for close range combat.
Can beat a small Pal to a pulp if need be.

Baseball bat for close-range combat.
Might be tough to get a home run with a Pal.

Use it to beat down anyone you don't like.
